summary: Full player journey trace: IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC → ParchmentPreRun/HubAntre → TransitionBiome → BroceliandeForest3D → [run] → Hub. 2 CRITICAL breaks, 4 HIGH, 2 MEDIUM, 2 PASS.

checks.name: HubAntre → TransitionBiome → BroceliandeForest3D
checks.detail: HubAntre.gd:661 → TransitionBiome.tscn:715 → BroceliandeForest3D.tscn — all scenes exist.

checks.name: BroceliandeForest3D → MerlinGame.tscn (OBSOLETE path)
checks.detail: broceliande_forest_3d.gd:9 GAME_SCENE='res://scenes/MerlinGame.tscn'. _on_hub():1222 routes to MerlinGame.tscn when _merlin_found. MerlinGame.tscn uses old merlin_game_controller.gd (legacy card loop), NOT Run3D.tscn/GameFlowController. Encounters now handled inline via EncounterCardOverlay. This path is DEAD for the new loop. Fix: always route to HUB_SCENE.

checks.name: EndRunScreen shown in live flow
checks.detail: EndRunScreen.tscn (uses scripts/ui/end_run_screen.gd:EndRunScreenUI) is NEVER shown in the live BroceliandeForest3D flow. GameFlowController.wire_end_screen() is the only wiring code, but GameFlowController is never instantiated as autoload or anywhere in live scenes. EndRunScreenUI.return_to_hub signal is also disconnected. Player has NO run summary screen after a run.

checks.name: IntroPersonalityQuiz + SceneRencontreMerlin deleted (director q-20260414-005)
checks.detail: Director ordered deletion via q-20260414-005. Both scenes still exist: scenes/IntroPersonalityQuiz.tscn + scripts/IntroPersonalityQuiz.gd + scripts/quiz_data.gd and scenes/SceneRencontreMerlin.tscn + scripts/SceneRencontreMerlin.gd + scripts/rencontre_llm.gd + scripts/rencontre_dialogue.gd. Not reachable from live flow but pollute codebase.

checks.name: Run3D.tscn + GameFlowController in live flow
checks.detail: Run3D.tscn exists (uses run_3d_controller.gd). GameFlowController (scripts/core/game_flow_controller.gd) wires HubScreen + Run3DController + EndRunScreen. Neither is in project.godot autoloads. No scene in live flow instantiates GameFlowController. GAME_SCENE in forest goes to MerlinGame.tscn, not Run3D.tscn. Director decision q-20260414-004 says: Migrer le chemin actif vers game_flow_controller (refonte propre). Task E2E-DEAD-PATH-GAME-FLOW-CONTROLLER P4 covers this.

checks.name: Two EndRunScreen implementations
checks.detail: scripts/run/end_run_screen.gd (class EndRunScreen) is a newer implementation used by GameFlowController. scripts/ui/end_run_screen.gd (class EndRunScreenUI) is the older version referenced by scenes/EndRunScreen.tscn. Confusion and dead code. Should consolidate.

checks.name: Orphaned helper scripts (rencontre_llm, rencontre_dialogue, quiz_data)
checks.detail: scripts/quiz_data.gd, scripts/rencontre_llm.gd, scripts/rencontre_dialogue.gd are helpers for deleted scenes. No other scripts use RencontreLLM, RencontreDialogue, or QuizData outside their defining files. Should be deleted.

checks.name: MenuPrincipal.tscn vs Menu3DPC.tscn — active menu
checks.detail: Both scenes exist. Live flow: IntroCeltOS → Menu3DPC.tscn. MenuPrincipalMerlin.gd references ParchmentPreRun/SelectionSauvegarde/MenuOptions which suggests it's a parallel menu. SceneSelector.gd lists both. MenuPrincipal.tscn may be an orphan or alternate entry.

checks.name: TransitionBiome.gd NEXT_SCENE comment stale
checks.detail: TransitionBiome.gd:17 comment says '# 3D forest walk → then MerlinGame'. MerlinGame path is obsolete. Minor documentation debt.
